description.value: Price +3 bonus; Aura strong enchantment; CL 12th; Weight â DESCRIPTION This special ability can only be placed on one-handed or two-handed firearms. A greater lucky firearm is nearly identical to a lucky firearm, but its reservoir holds 3 grit points instead of 1. A firearm cannot have both this special ability and the lucky special ability.
